title: ctenitis sloanei
intro: Ctenitis sloanei, also known as the Sloane's wood fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to Australia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The Sloane's wood fern is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
